sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102353" key="tanusi/dromos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τᾰνῠσί-δρομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n102353.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running swiftly</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sapph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">71</biblScope> </bibl> (dub. cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνυοδρόμον</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
